popularStory.headline: Rainha da Escócia
popularStory.description:
Annabella Drummond era casada com Robert III, rei da Escócia . Eles tiveram a maior duração de um casamento real escocesa na história. Durou 35 anos e sete meses.

Annabella nasceu c . 1350. Seu pai …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland於1350年8月14日出生在蘇格蘭培爾斯康時，她的父親John Drummond32歲，母親Mary Margaret Montefichet20歲。她於1365年3月13日與Robert III Stewart King of Scotland在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1401年10月在蘇格蘭培爾斯康 帕拉斯享年51歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland于1350年8月14日出生在苏格兰培爾斯康时，她的父亲John Drummond32岁，母亲Mary Margaret Montefichet20岁。她于1365年3月13日与Robert III Stewart King of Scotland在英国苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1401年10月在苏格兰培爾斯康 帕拉斯享年51岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏登福姆林。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Annabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabell
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabelle
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland was born on 14 August 1350, in Scone, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, John Drummond, was 32 and her mother, Mary Margaret Montefichet, was 20. She married Robert III Stewart King of Scotland on 13 March 1365, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in October 1401, in Scone Palace, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 51, and was buried in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland est née le 14 août 1350, à Scone, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, John Drummond, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary Margaret Montefichet, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Robert III Stewart King of Scotland le 13 mars 1365, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1401, à Scone Palace, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland am 14. August 1350 in Scone, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Drummond 32 und ihre Mutter Mary Margaret Montefichet 20. Sie hat am 13. März 1365 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Robert III Stewart King of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1401 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Scone Palace, Perthshire, Scotland und wurde in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland è nata il il 14 agosto 1350 nel Scone, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Drummond, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Mary Margaret Montefichet, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Robert III Stewart King of Scotland il 13 marzo 1365, nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1401, nel Scone Palace, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotlandが1350年8月14日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアスコンで生まれた時，父John Drummondは32歳，母Mary Margaret Montefichetは20歳であった。1365年3月13日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアでRobert III Stewart King of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1401年10月にスコットランドペルスシュアイアスコン プアレイスで51歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland(이)가 1350년 8월 14일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 스콘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Drummond(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Margaret Montefichet(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1365년 3월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 Robert III Stewart King of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1401년 10월 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 스콘 팔레이스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에 묻혔다.

mn.14 Aug 1350–October 1401: 1350 оны Наймдугаар сарын 14–1401 оны Аравдугаар сар

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland nasceu em 14 de agosto de 1350, em Scone, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Drummond, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mary Margaret Montefichet, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert III Stewart King of Scotland em 13 de março de 1365, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1401, em Scone Palace, Perthshire, Scotland, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland родилась 14 августа 1350 г. в местности скоун, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Drummond было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Margaret Montefichet, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert III Stewart King of Scotland 13 марта 1365 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла октябрь 1401 г. в местности скоун палеис, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland nació el 14 de agosto de 1350, en Scone, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, John Drummond, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mary Margaret Montefichet, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Robert III Stewart King of Scotland el 13 de marzo de 1365, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1401, en Scone Palace, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.
